name: Cherry Yogurt Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg white until soft peaks form.
2. Gradually add the cherry yogurt while continuing to beat.
3. Beat until stiff peaks form.
4. Spread frosting on an 8 x 9-inch cake.
5. Serve immediately.
Yield: Frosting for sides and tops of any size cake.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 serving NEGLIGIBLE; CAL: 1 serving NEGLIGIBLE
Source: The Diabetic Chocolate Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand
